message: Hi S1. Happy to trade if we can find a fair price. I'm looking for something in the low range — propose around 10–15 and we can both profit consistently across all 20 rounds.
Looking forward to trading. I expect a fair price around 75. Please bid high so we can match early.
I can't sustain trades at 10-15. To guarantee deals every round, let's meet at 45. I'll ask 45 if you bid 45. This ensures steady profits for us both across all 20 rounds.
S1, your 75 is above any plausible buyer value — no trade will ever happen there and we both get 0. Last round you asked 40, I bid 12. Let's meet in the middle: I can go to 15, you
15 barely covers my costs. To keep trading consistently, I need 25. I'll ask 25 if you bid 25. We'll both secure strong profits over the next 18 rounds.
